mechanism_narrative: A rise in the housing market proxy indicates a strengthening demand for goods, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 1-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in housing market recoveries are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: An increase in the unemployment rate proxy signals a weakening labor market, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in labor market contractions are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the industrial production proxy signals a weakening supply of goods, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.03 over any 1-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in supply-side contractions are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rise in the retail sales proxy signals a strengthening demand for goods, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in retail sales recoveries are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the federal funds rate proxy signals a tightening monetary cycle, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.03 over any 1-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in monetary tightening cycles are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: An increase in the payroll employment proxy signals a strengthening labor market, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in labor market expansions are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rise in the GDP proxy signals a strengthening demand for goods, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 1-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in GDP growth cycles are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the industrial production proxy signals a weakening supply of goods, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in supply-side contractions are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).
